response.overview: Meet MD, a street smart hustler who is always ready to take risks for his next big score. But wait, there's a catch!  #ProjectMD starring Sayee Vishnu Abba, Vishal B, Chandra Kiran, Akarsh Ponnala, Kaushik K, Anush Vardhan, Naveen Akhil, Senapati Sriteja, Devamsh Ponnala and Raja Yekkati.  Written, directed and edited by Chandra Kiran Original Background Score (and Final Mix) by Sayee Vishnu Abba Additional DOP - Production Associate - SFX by Raja Yekkati  Special Thanks to Aditya BN, Nagarjuna Sarikonda, Yashwanth Nemali.
response.tagline: Meet MD, a street smart hustler who is always ready to take risks for his next big score. But wait, there's a catch!
response.title: #Project MD
